basic_details.job_title: BFUHS Nursing Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 17 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences
basic_details.short_information: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS) Nursing Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 27-04-2026 on the official website bfuhs.ac.in. A total of 17 vacancies have been announced through the BFUHS Nursing Faculty Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age Relaxation: SC/BC: 5 years; Physically Handicapped: 10 years; Ex-servicemen: as per Punjab Govt. Rules

qualification.details: Professor (Nursing): M.Sc. Nursing in the concerned specialty, 4 years teaching experience after M.Sc. Nursing as Associate Professor or any higher teaching post in a College of Nursing. Ph.D (N) will be given preference (with minimum total teaching experience of 12 years after M.Sc. Nursing). Knowledge of Punjabi up to Matric level. Registration with Punjab Nurses Registration Council. Associate Professor (Nursing): M.Sc. Nursing in the concerned specialty, 5 years teaching experience after M.Sc. Nursing as Lecturer or any higher teaching post in a Nursing college. Ph.D (N) will be given preference (with minimum total teaching experience of 08 years after M.Sc. Nursing). For super specialty Diploma Course, 05 years teaching experience after M.Sc. Nursing in the concerned/allied specialty. Knowledge of Punjabi up to Matric level. Registration with Punjab Nurses Registration Council. Assistant Professor (Nursing): M.Sc. Nursing in the concerned specialty, 03 years teaching experience after M.Sc (N) in the concerned specialty as Tutor or any higher teaching post in College of Nursing. For Super Specialty Diploma Course, 03 years teaching experience after M.Sc. Nursing in the concerned allied specialty with the Post Basic Diploma in concerned super-specialty. M.Sc. Nursing in the Super specialty concerned as lecturer will be preferred. Ph.D (N) will be given preference. Knowledge of Punjabi up to Matric level. Registration with Punjab Nurses Registration Council. Tutor/Demonstrator Nursing: M.Sc. Nursing in the concerned specialty. Knowledge of Punjabi up to Matric level. Registration with Punjab Nurses Registration Council.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BFUHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BFUHS Nursing Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the BFUHS Nursing Faculty posts is 17 May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Nursing Faculty at BFUHS?
faq.answer: There are a total of 17 vacancies for Nursing Faculty positions across various roles, including Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, and Tutor/Demonstrator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 50 years for all the Nursing Faculty posts at BFUHS.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for Assistant Professor (Nursing)?
faq.answer: For Assistant Professor (Nursing), candidates need an M.Sc. Nursing in the concerned specialty with 03 years of teaching experience after M.Sc (N) as a Tutor or higher post. Specific requirements exist for Super Specialty Diploma courses.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC category candidates is Rs. 2360/-, which includes Rs. 2000 as the fee and Rs. 360 as GST.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided. SC/BC candidates get 5 years, Physically Handicapped candidates get 10 years, and Ex-servicemen are eligible as per Punjab Government Rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BFUHS Nursing Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will primarily be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Punjab apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification mentions knowledge of Punjabi up to Matric level and registration with Punjab Nurses Registration Council, suggesting a preference or requirement for candidates with a connection to Punjab.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary structure for a Professor (Nursing) at BFUHS?
faq.answer: The salary for a Professor (Nursing) is as per the 7th Pay Commission, which includes a pay scale of Rs. 15600-39100 with a Grade Pay of Rs. 7800.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official website of BFUHS for more details.
